entity.label: Kinah
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: An elegy, a city in the extreme south of Judah (Josh. 15:22). It was probably not far from the Dead Sea, in the Wady Fikreh.

nodes.label: Kinah
nodes.description: An elegy, a city in the extreme south of Judah (Josh. 15:22). It was probably not far from the Dead Sea, in the Wady Fikreh.

verses.text: And Kinah, and Dimonah, and Adadah,
